escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴🔴 Newegg 9550 Pro 30.72TB OOS Day 10 — DOUBLE-DIGIT MILESTONE. Structural OOS now IRREVERSIBLE.

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴🔴 DDR4 16Gb $68.125 (+0.93%) massive single-day jump — largest daily gain in observation period. Approaching $70 psychological level. Enterprise high-density DRAM demand shows no ceiling.
escalatedRisks.status: ACCELERATING - June 17, 2026。DDR4 16Gb single-day +$0.625 = +0.93%。4th consecutive day outpacing DDR5。June-to-date +$7.025 (+11.5%)。DDR4 8Gb $35.800 (0.00%) stabilized after 2-day decline — bifurcation signal EASING。Enterprise high-density DRAM capacity squeeze from HBM/DDR5 is irreversible。
escalatedRisks.detail: The DDR4 16Gb→DDR5 outperformance pattern is now 4 days old with accelerating magnitude。DDR4 8Gb stabilization at $35.800 is a bullish signal — the consumer-side correction may be exhausted, suggesting the next leg up could be synchronized across all DDR4 densities。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴 WF6 H2 2026 supply gap 2,200 tons/year + China WF6 price +203.83% MoM. 14 days to July 1 shutdown.
escalatedRisks.status: CRITICAL - 14 days to July 1 shutdown。2,200 tons/year gap = ~25% of global WF6 capacity。Kanto Denka + Central Glass permanent shutdown。China WF6 price $149.79/kg (+203.83% MoM April / +232.7% YoY)。Korean suppliers (SK Specialty/Foosung) notified 70-90% price increases。12-18 month qualification cycle。No relief until H1 2028。
escalatedRisks.detail: Every semiconductor manufacturing process using CVD tungsten deposition affected。Combined with MLC NAND exit (final 13 days), unprecedented dual supply contraction for NAND manufacturing。Today no new relief information。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴 MLC NAND ending June 2026 — FINAL 13 DAYS。Samsung Line 12 (Hwaseong) 2D NAND→HBM4 DRAM conversion confirmed。Global MLC capacity -41.7% in 2026。
escalatedRisks.status: SUSTAINED — June 17, 2026。Final 13 days of MLC NAND production。Combined with WF6 crisis (2200吨 H2缺口+WF6中国价+203.83%MoM, 14 days), NAND manufacturing faces unprecedented dual supply contraction in final two weeks。MLC spot prices tripled to $20-28。
escalatedRisks.detail: Samsung Line 12 ceased 2D NAND production March 2026, physically converted to HBM4 DRAM metallization。MLC NAND final shipments June 2026 — only 13 days remain。Combined with WF6 crisis, dual supply contraction with quantified shortfalls。Less than two weeks to act。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🟢 Micron June 24 earnings: guidance $33.5B revenue / $19.15 EPS / 81% gross margin / Capex raised to >$25B. FY2027 construction spending >$10B. 7 days away.
escalatedRisks.status: UPCOMING - June 24, 2026 (7 days)。Consensus Strong Buy。Revenue est. $34.5B / EPS ~$19 / GM ~81%。HBM 2026 fully sold out。Capex raised to >$25B (+$5B from prior $20B guidance)。FY2027 construction spending >$10B → new supply not before late 2027/2028。MU stock failed at $1,100 (FXLeaders 6/16) — sell-the-news risk elevated。
escalatedRisks.source: Micron IR / MarketBeat / multiple analysts / FXLeaders June 2026
escalatedRisks.detail: Micron Q3 FY2026 earnings (June 24) — most important memory industry event of the month。Capex raise to >$25B confirms structural supply shortage but meaningful new supply from new fabs not before late 2027/2028 due to cleanroom constraints and long construction lead times。Key: HBM capacity expansion timeline, DRAM/NAND ASP trajectory, 9650 PCIe Gen6 SSD ramp。
